meaning: n.布丁(一种以面粉,牛奶,鸡蛋等为基料的糊壮甜食)
examples: All that she would have to do was warm up the pudding.
We found the apple pie pudding too good to resist. Sure enough, it was delicious.
Stornoway black pudding and apple gratin is nothing of the sort, and features sun-dried tomatoes and pine nuts.
"This is what they give to each family plus flour, cookies, pudding, and meat, " Rahman wrote.
